    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Coordinate
    Coordinate.getNeighbor(Direction direction)
    Returns a point adjacent to this point in the given direction.
    Tile
    Tile.getNeighbor(Direction direction)
    Returns the tile at the next direction, as if we took 1 step in the given direction.
